title: Macrothelypteris procera
taxonomy: Macrothelypteris procera is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Macrothelypteris and is native to tropical regions. This fern species is classified as a member of the subclass Polypodiidae and the class Polypodiopsida. Macrothelypteris procera is further classified as a part of the phylum Pteridophyta and the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Macrothelypteris procera reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the plant kingdom.
